info.name: CRMS Mobile API Collection
info.description: Collection of all CRMS Mobile API endpoints for testing and development in Bruno or Postman.

request.description: device_id is required and must be 2-255 characters. device_name is optional, but when sent must be 2-255 characters.

body.raw:
{
  "notes": "Checking in from site",

}

request.description: Returns only the authenticated employee/user wallet history. user_id and employee_id filters are ignored for this list endpoint.
